masterPrompt: Mythic Natural Realism, cinematic square environmental artwork with tactile stone, weather, water, roots, and living light. Create one master composition for node edge; all five capacity states will be deterministic treatments of this exact Recraft scene, so do not encode a capacity state or warning tint in the composition itself. Prompt intent: Render living convergence of breath, tide, stone, canopy, weather, and relationship as the canonical edge environment, preserving a luminous watershed spiral held at the living mountain heart as the spatial landmark shared with its children. Universal human-capacity force: living convergence of breath, tide, stone, canopy, weather, and relationship. This identity is universal and independent of any aim, goal, profession, or sport. Fractal family: self-similar living mountain watershed. Parent geometry must visibly become child geography rather than a separate icon or panel. Inherited parent visual DNA: root source: the universal living mountain watershed. Transition anchor: preserve and clarify a luminous watershed spiral held at the living mountain heart. Neutral master palette: obsidian basalt, moonlit silver, lichen green, glacial cyan, warm natural gold, balanced full tonal range suitable for later cool, clear, amber, and controlled-crimson grading. Accessibility purpose: Describe the edge environment as a non-diagnostic natural process whose identity and capacity state remain understandable without relying on colour. Pipeline intent 2.0.0: Generate one universal, text-free Mythic Natural Realism composition whose inherited landmark remains spatially stable across all deterministic capacity-state treatments. Single immersive natural world, inspectable detail, coherent central landmark, no decorative bokeh, no gradient blobs. No embedded text, numbers, or logos. No interface, cards, frames, badges, charts, people, faces, medical symbols, diagnoses, or aim-specific objects.
